data.name: HENTAI Waifu Pieces
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Waifu Pieces combines the classic challenge of jigsaw puzzles with a sleek, modern, and immersive aesthetic. Every piece you lock into place brings you one step closer to revealing stunning waifus in high-definition artwork.

Game Highlights:

Striking Visual Identity: Fluid, 100% animated menus that breathe life into the game from the very first click.

30 Erotic Levels: Each puzzle reveals a new scene—deeper, more sensual, and more captivating.

Animated Rewards: Every puzzle features high-quality animated videos for each girl.

60 Achievements: Unlock goals as you master the tiles.

Art Gallery: Revisit your most intimate moments whenever you desire.

Custom Soundtrack: You choose the music that best fits your flow while solving puzzles.

Puzzle Reveal Mode: Perfect for those who want to progress faster and enjoy the art and videos in the gallery immediately.

As you progress, the puzzles become more challenging. Let the girls lead you to the pinnacle of desire.

MATURE CONTENT DESCRIPTION:

The developers describe the content as follows:

This game is intended for adults only. It contains adult content, including frequent nudity. A significant portion of the gallery contains images of nudity, including visible panties, buttocks, breasts, and vaginas.

Fully nude characters with visible genitalia.

All characters are depicted as adults aged 18 or older.

AI-GENERATED CONTENT DISCLOSURE:

The developers describe how the game uses AI-generated content:

Most illustrations are AI-generated, with all remaining elements independently drawn, edited, and refined by our artist's hand to ensure high-quality, polished results.

data.short_description: 《Hentai Waifu Pieces》為解謎遊戲帶來時尚且引人入勝的玩法。在充滿活力的環境中，搭配全動畫選單與獨特視覺風格，拼湊高品質的美少女插圖。您可自行選擇音樂，並解鎖充滿令人驚嘆藝術作品與影片的畫廊
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 印尼語, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows 10+ (64 bits)
  • 處理器: intel 7 gen or + | AMD Ryzen Série 1000. +
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: gtx750 +
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows 10+ (64 bits)
  • 處理器: intel I3 10º gen + | AMD Ryzen Série 5000 +
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: gtx 1050 ti +

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or equivalent (64-bit)
  • 處理器: intel 7 gen or + | AMD Ryzen Série 1000. +
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
